strengths: Exceeds seniority requirement with 13+ years of full-stack development and current Staff Software Engineer title; demonstrates sustained senior-level roles across multiple companies
Perfect match on primary stack: actively using TypeScript and Node.js at re:cinq; TypeScript/Node.js expertise demonstrated across Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and Dunnhumby roles
Proven architecture and scalability experience: designed microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby; AWS CDK expertise at Optilyz
concerns: Testing framework expertise gap: Jest, Vitest, and Playwright not explicitly listed despite being core to role; only TDD and Selenium teaching mentioned, not required modern frameworks
Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned; resume shows Node.js/TypeScript mastery but no specific Nest.js application experience, requiring framework ramp-up
Database specificity unclear: MongoDB mentioned at Optilyz and generic 'SQL' in skills, but no explicit PostgreSQL or MySQL experience despite these being required primary databases
response.justification: Bogdan is overqualified in seniority (Staff level for Mid-Senior role) with 13+ years of proven full-stack development and clear mastery of the primary TypeScript/Node.js stack. Current role at re:cinq directly applies these technologies in production. Architecture and scalability demonstrated through high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby and optimization work at Optilyz. Primary gaps are specific to tooling: testing frameworks (Jest/Vitest/Playwright) not explicitly evidenced despite strong TDD advocacy, Nest.js framework not mentioned though Node.js/TypeScript fundamentals are solid, and specific RDBMS (PostgreSQL/MySQL) experience not clearly documented. These are learnable and not blockers given demonstrated ability across technology stacks. Overqualification risk exists (may seek more senior or autonomous roles), but technical fit is strong.
